description: Grass — the RPG Tiles Vector pack's opaque 64px grass fill (public/assets/tilemaps/rpg-terrain.png, the pure-green centre block at cols 3-4, rows 0-1). Soft-shaded green with scattered blade tufts authored into the raster, scaled to the world tile at native resolution so it reads as real ground, never a flat magnified cell. The 2×2 field samples four centre cells so a meadow varies instead of repeating one tile.
